name: Crock Pot Chicken and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain pimientos.
2. Place rice in crockpot.
3. Combine remaining ingredients (except chicken and cheese) in a bowl. Mix well.
4. Pour half of the mixture over the rice.
5. Place chicken on top.
6. Pour remaining soup mixture over all.
7. Cook on high for 3 hours or until chicken is tender.
8. Garnish with cheese.
